case_title: ANDY ER ATUEGBU VS. DELTA AIR LINES,INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATUEGBU, ANDY ER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-08-2023 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY ATUEGBU, ANDY ER AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES,INC. GLOBAL GENERAL INSURANCE SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATUEGBU, ANDY ER AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES,INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-08-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-08-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ALLYSYN OVERTON. PLAINTIFF ANDY ER ATUEGBU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DELTA AIRLINES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY YVETTE RAWLS-PARKS, SR. PARALEGAL. DEFENDANT GLOBAL GENERAL INSURANCE SERVICES IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES HIS CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE AGAINST GLOBAL GENERAL INSURANCE SERVICES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ALLYSYN OVERTON; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
STIPULATION TO ALLOW THE CASE TO BE HEARD BY A JUDGE PRO TEM. FILED BY ATUEGBU, ANDY ER DELTA AIR LINES,INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATUEGBU, ANDY ER AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL GENERAL INSURANCE SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ATUEGBU, ANDY ER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES,INC. PLAINTIFF DID NOT PROVIDE BURDEN OF PROOF. PLAINTIFF DISMISSES CLAIM AGAINST GLOBAL GENERAL INSURANCE SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-19-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DELTA AIR LINES,INC.
